name: War of the Spanish Succession
combatants: Grand Alliance (UK, Austria, Netherlands), Bourbon Coalition (France, Spain)
description: A major European conflict triggered by the death of the last Habsburg King of Spain.

name: Franco-Prussian War
combatants: Kingdom of Prussia & Allies, Second French Empire
description: A conflict that led to the unification of Germany under the Prussian Crown and the fall of Napoleon III.
